summary: Comprehensive testing of Demo Data Management and Forever Free Account features. All 12 backend tests passed. UI testing confirmed Settings page Demo Data section with Load/Delete buttons and confirmation dialog. Schedule A shows disposed BMW asset from demo data with disposition minutes link.

issues: Console warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - Visual Editor wrapper issue, not affecting functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/demo/status - returns data counts with correct structure
GET /api/demo/status - requires authentication (401)
POST /api/demo/seed - returns appropriate response (seeded or already has data)
POST /api/demo/seed - requires authentication (401)
DELETE /api/demo/data - deletes all user data successfully
DELETE /api/demo/data - requires authentication (401)
Forever free account has plan_type=forever_free
Forever free account has status=active and is_active=true
Forever free account has all 8 premium features enabled
Forever free account can access beneficiary dashboard (premium feature)
Forever free account has write access (not read-only)
Demo data includes disposed asset (2019 BMW X5 SUV)
Demo data includes disposition minutes
UI: Settings page shows Demo Data Management section
UI: Data counts display (Trusts, Minutes, Assets, Total Records)
UI: Load Demo Data button disabled when user has data
UI: Delete All Data button shows confirmation dialog
UI: Confirmation dialog lists all data types to be deleted
UI: Schedule A Active tab shows 8 active assets
UI: Schedule A All tab shows disposed BMW asset with 'Disposed' status
UI: Disposed asset shows disposition date and minutes link
UI: Forever free account has Beneficiaries link in sidebar (premium access)
critical_code_review_comments: Demo data seeding creates 2 trusts with rich data including disposed asset (BMW) with disposition_minutes_ref
Forever free account logic in dependencies.py correctly checks FOREVER_FREE_EMAILS set
Forever free gets all premium features in PLAN_FEATURES dict
Delete endpoint properly cleans up all collections in correct order
MOCKED: Postmark email service (sandbox mode) - no email actually sent
seed_data_creation: Test user test_delete_demo@trustoffice.com created for delete endpoint testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Demo data management endpoints fully tested. GET /api/demo/status returns counts, POST /api/demo/seed creates 2 trusts with entities/assets/minutes/distributions/benevolence/compensation/tasks/certificates including one disposed BMW asset with disposition_minutes_ref. DELETE /api/demo/data removes all user data. Forever free account (admin@wingpointtrusts.com) has plan_type=forever_free with all 8 premium features enabled. Settings page has Demo Data Management section with Load/Delete buttons.

demo_endpoints.GET /api/demo/status: Returns has_data, total_records, counts object, can_seed, can_delete
demo_endpoints.POST /api/demo/seed: Creates 2 trusts with all feature demo data including disposed asset
demo_endpoints.DELETE /api/demo/data: Removes all user data, preserves subscription/notification prefs

demo_data_content.disposed_asset: 2019 BMW X5 SUV with disposition_date and disposition_notes

settings_page_ui.demo_data_section: Shows data counts, Load Demo Data button, Delete All Data button
settings_page_ui.delete_confirmation: Dialog shows all data types, warning, confirm/cancel buttons
